title: rosa × turbinata var. campanulata
intro: Rosa × turbinata var. campanulata, also known as the Campanulate Rose, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Rosa genus and is native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The Campanulate Rose has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function, and has been used to treat conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
